SHORT::SHORT REJECTION PLAN.title: Short rejection plan
SHORT::SHORT REJECTION PLAN.trigger: If BTC runs into 78,570.85 (WO, PDL) with an extension into major short-liq zone 79,960.90 and rejects on 15m, short the fade.
SHORT::SHORT REJECTION PLAN.note: Use only after rejection confirmation. Cross-exchange funding leans short.

SHORT::SHORT BREAKDOWN PLAN.title: Short breakdown plan
SHORT::SHORT BREAKDOWN PLAN.trigger: If BTC closes below 76,638.00 (DumpMax) and then targets OKX far-zone 76,638.00 and fails the retest, short continuation.
SHORT::SHORT BREAKDOWN PLAN.note: Use only if support is lost cleanly and downside momentum expands.

LONG::LONG PULLBACK PLAN.title: Long pullback plan
LONG::LONG PULLBACK PLAN.trigger: If BTC sweeps 76,638.00 (DumpMax) with a flush into major long-liq zone 73,594.16 and reclaims on 15m, long the bounce.
LONG::LONG PULLBACK PLAN.note: Use only after reclaim confirmation. Funding supports this long. Shorts look more vulnerable.

SHORT::SHORT LOCAL RESISTANCE PLAN.title: Short local resistance plan
SHORT::SHORT LOCAL RESISTANCE PLAN.trigger: If BTC tags 79,118.43 and rejects it on 15m, short the fade.
SHORT::SHORT LOCAL RESISTANCE PLAN.note: This is an extra short-term resistance plan for a closer short entry.

LONG::LONG SUPPORT RECLAIM PLAN.title: Long support reclaim plan
LONG::LONG SUPPORT RECLAIM PLAN.trigger: If BTC dips into 76,305.60 and reclaims it cleanly on 15m, long the reaction.
LONG::LONG SUPPORT RECLAIM PLAN.note: This is an extra short-term support plan for a cleaner nearby long location.

LONG::LONG BREAKOUT PLAN.title: Long breakout plan
LONG::LONG BREAKOUT PLAN.trigger: If BTC closes above 78,570.85 (WO, PDL) and then targets OKX far-zone 79,446.10 and holds the retest, long continuation.
LONG::LONG BREAKOUT PLAN.note: Use only if momentum holds and no pullback entry appears first.
